overview.short: Sagargad Fort is located in Alibag taluka of Raigad District.
overview.description: Sagargad Fort is located in Alibag taluka of Raigad District. The path to the fort starts from Khandale village on Alibag-Pen Road. This fort can be visited all round the year. A gentle walk of 2 hours from the village Khandale can reach us up to the fort.

topPlaces.name: Ambale, Mawal
topPlaces.description: Ambale is a village and gram panchayat in India, situated in Mawal taluka of Pune district in the state of Maharashtra. It encompasses an area of 826 ha (2,041 acres).

topPlaces.name: Mahagaon, Mawal
topPlaces.description: Mahagaon is a village and gram panchayat in India, situated in Mawal taluka of Pune district in the state of Maharashtra. It encompasses an area of 375.37 ha (928 acres).

topPlaces.name: Veshvi
topPlaces.description: Veshvi is a small village in Raigad District, Maharashtra state in Western India. The 2011 Census of India recorded a total of 1,655 residents in the village.

topPlaces.name: Tariq Garden collapse
topPlaces.description: On 25 August 2020, a building collapsed in Mahad, India, killing at least 12 people and trapping at least 60 others.

topPlaces.name: Alibag
topPlaces.description: Alibag (pronounced [əlibaːɡ]), also known as Alibaug, is a coastal city and a municipal council in the Raigad district of Maharashtra, India. It is the headquarters of the Raigad district, and is south of the city of Mumbai.

topPlaces.name: Dharamtar Port
topPlaces.description: Dharamtar Port, commonly known as JSW Dharamtar Port is a port located on the right bank of the Amba river 10 miles (16 km) from its mouth.

topPlaces.name: Colaba Observatory
topPlaces.description: Colaba Observatory, also known as the Bombay Observatory, was an astronomical, timekeeping, geomagnetic and meteorological observatory located on the Island of Colaba, Mumbai (Bombay), India.

topPlaces.name: Varsoli
topPlaces.description: Varsoli is a village in Mawal taluka of Pune district in the state of Maharashtra, India. It encompasses an area of 240.03 ha (593 acres).

items.note: Ambale is a village and gram panchayat in India, situated in Mawal taluka of Pune district in the state of Maharashtra. It encompasses an area of 826 ha (2,041 acres).
Mahagaon is a village and gram panchayat in India, situated in Mawal taluka of Pune district in the state of Maharashtra. It encompasses an area of 375.37 ha (928 acres).
Veshvi is a small village in Raigad District, Maharashtra state in Western India. The 2011 Census of India recorded a total of 1,655 residents in the village.
On 25 August 2020, a building collapsed in Mahad, India, killing at least 12 people and trapping at least 60 others.

Alibag (pronounced [əlibaːɡ]), also known as Alibaug, is a coastal city and a municipal council in the Raigad district of Maharashtra, India. It is the headquarters of the Raigad district, and is south of the city of Mumbai.
Dharamtar Port, commonly known as JSW Dharamtar Port is a port located on the right bank of the Amba river 10 miles (16 km) from its mouth.
Colaba Observatory, also known as the Bombay Observatory, was an astronomical, timekeeping, geomagnetic and meteorological observatory located on the Island of Colaba, Mumbai (Bombay), India.
Varsoli is a village in Mawal taluka of Pune district in the state of Maharashtra, India. It encompasses an area of 240.03 ha (593 acres).

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Sagargad?
faq.a: The best time to visit Sagargad is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

The nearest airport is Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj International Airport, Mumbai (49 km) and the nearest railway station is Mumbai CSMT (34 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Sagargad?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Sagargad at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Sagargad?
faq.a: Stays in Sagargad start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Sagargad?
faq.a: The top attractions are Ambale, Mawal, Mahagaon, Mawal, Veshvi, Tariq Garden collapse, Alibag.
